stage: 9.8B Featured Menu and Full Menu Modal
validations: Dashboard featured flags persisted after refresh.
Restaurant Premium Signature section shows only featured items when configured.
Restaurant full menu modal shows all items, category tabs, and closes with Escape.
Cafe Premium repeats featured-only Signature behavior and full menu modal.
Mobile full menu modal opens as a readable full-height sheet without horizontal overflow.
When no item is featured, premium Signature section safely falls back to real menu highlights.
When no real menu items exist, Cafe Premium safely renders fallback sample menu cards and modal items.
